summary: Iteration 15: Complete testing of Application Expenses feature. All 11 test cases PASSED. Backend APIs (7/7 pytest tests), Frontend UI (Bursary Add Expenses, Training Add Expenses, Expenses Page 3 tabs), and integration all verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test expenses added to bursary application 41b3663d and training application e1d7545e during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Application expenses feature fully implemented and working. Bursary apps at /applications show Add/Edit Expenses button on non-draft cards. Training apps at /training-applications have same feature. Expenses page at /expenses has 3 tabs (Additional Expenses, Bursary Application, Training Application). All expense categories (Flights, Accommodation, Car Hire/Shuttle, Catering) with notes fields working. Totals calculated correctly. Context menu on right-click also provides Add/Edit Expenses option.

1_Bursary_Add_Expenses_Button.details: Add Expenses / Edit Expenses button appears on non-draft bursary application cards at /applications. 5 buttons found across 7 applications (2 were draft).

2_Bursary_Expenses_Dialog.details: Dialog opens with 4 categories (Flights, Accommodation, Car Hire/Shuttle, Catering), each with amount and notes fields. Total calculated at bottom. data-testid attributes present for all fields.

3_Bursary_Save_Expenses.details: Entered Flights: 3000, Accommodation: 2000, Car: 500, Catering: 300. Total displayed: R 5,800.00. Save successful - 'Expenses saved successfully' toast appeared. 'Expenses Added' badge shown on card.

4_Bursary_Right_Click_Context_Menu.details: Right-click on application card shows context menu with 'Edit Expenses' option (since expenses already added). Menu items: View Details, Edit Expenses, Change Status.

5_Training_Add_Expenses_Button.details: Add Expenses button appears on non-draft training application at /training-applications.

6_Training_Save_Expenses.details: Entered expenses (Flights: 1500, Accommodation: 2500, Car: 300, Catering: 200). Total: R 4,500.00. Save successful with toast and badge.

7_Expenses_Page_Three_Tabs.details: Expenses page at /expenses has 3 tabs with data-testid: tab-additional-expenses, tab-bursary-expenses, tab-training-expenses.

8_Expenses_Bursary_Tab.details: Bursary Application tab shows: Total Bursary Expenses R 5,800.00, 1 application with expenses. Table with columns: Applicant, Status, Flights, Accommodation, Car Hire/Shuttle, Catering, Total. Grand Total row at bottom.

9_Expenses_Training_Tab.details: Training Application tab shows: Total Training Expenses R 4,500.00, 1 application. Table includes Training Type column. Data: Jane Smith, Project Management, pending status with all expense amounts.

10_Backend_Add_Expenses_API.details: POST /api/applications/{id}/expenses returns 200 with expenses data. POST /api/training-applications/{id}/expenses also working. Edit existing expenses works by calling same endpoint.

11_Backend_Application_Expenses_Aggregat.details: GET /api/expenses/application-expenses returns {bursary: [...], training: [...]} with each entry containing application_id, applicant_name, status, expenses object, and calculated total.

test_cases: test_07_expense_totals_calculation - Verify totals are calculated correctly
